metadata.description: AI-powered acquisition workflows for DTC and ecommerce teams — UGC campaigns, SEO content, and affiliate program management

plugins.name: ground-acquisition
plugins.description: 13 AI workflow systems for DTC and ecommerce teams: UGC creative briefing, creator outreach, content reviewing, performance tagging, SEO keyword research, content planning, content writing, monthly ranking reviews, affiliate recruiting, onboarding kits, content & placement QA, performance optimization, and payout reporting.
